exercises.title: Factor Graph Builder
exercises.description: Build a factor graph from a parity check matrix.
tasks: Add edges based on non-zero entries
hints: H[i,j] = 1 means factor i connects to variable j
Test with Steane and surface code H matrices

exercises.title: Basic BP Decoder
exercises.description: Implement belief propagation for binary codes.
tasks: Iterate until convergence or max iterations
Output hard decisions from final beliefs
hints: Use tanh rule for check nodes

exercises.title: Quaternary BP for Quantum Codes
exercises.description: Extend BP to handle X, Y, Z errors.
tasks: Messages are 4-vectors (I, X, Y, Z probabilities)
Handle both X and Z syndrome constraints
hints: Each qubit can have I, X, Y, or Z error
X stabilizers detect Z and Y errors
Z stabilizers detect X and Y errors

exercises.title: BP + OSD Hybrid
exercises.description: Combine BP with Ordered Statistics Decoding.
tasks: Run BP to get reliability ordering
hints: Fix top n-m bits where m = search width
